name: simple-item-plugin
documentation: # Simple Item Plugin

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.utils.call_if_version_match
documentation:
Generates a version check for `{opts.lantern_load.version_check}` functions

Checks each versioning score exactly before running `impl` function.

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.api.generate_call
documentation: Generates the actual call function that checks the version

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.api.generate_api
documentation:
Generates API calls based on `@public` listed inside of function files

Note: Must be the very first line of the file

TODO: Support @public on any line of the function doc comment
        https://github.com/SpyglassMC/Spyglass/wiki/IMP-Doc

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.plugin.beet_default
documentation:
This plugins generates all the versioning requirements that LL needs

When writing your data pack, you can ignore any versioning you need.
This plugin will allow you to automatically version any implementation
  alongside with defining APIs via an `@public` at the top of the file.

It will generate call function for any api route as defined in the config.

classes.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.models.Version
documentation: Provides methods and fields for the version for ease of use

classes.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.models.VersioningOptions

methods.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.models.VersioningOptions.render_all
documentation:
This validator handles the rendering of all structures inside

In Pydantic V2, we would likely try to generalize this behavior in `beet`.
For now, we have to match every key-value in our values dict to figure out
 if the string or string within needs to be rendered.

documentation: type: ignore

documentation: type: ignore

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.load_tags
documentation: Sets the Lantern Load tags for deps, enumeration, and resolution

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.clear_schedule_loops
documentation: Ensures every schedule loop is disabled

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.resolve_func
documentation: Resolves the best version

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.resolve_advancements
documentation: Select packs that match refactor statement

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.resolve_advancement
documentation:
Adds version checking to advancement conditions

We do this by adding new value checks to the criteria. Within the player
  conditions, we attempt to append our version_check OR edit the existing
  check for the correct scoreholder_part (TODO: make this clearer probably).

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.enumerate_func
documentation:
The enumeration function which sets the best version

Enumeration works by chaining calls. First, we need to check the major
  version (or which ever is the highest one). If it's equivalent to our
  already highest version, then we go down to the next step.

This goes until we've reached the end of each version step.

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.enumerate_step
documentation:
A single step in the enumerate function

A step cooresponds to a version part (major, minor, etc).

functions.name: simple_item_plugin.versioning.load.generate_load
documentation:
This is the main versioning plugin

There are 3 parts to integrating lantern load for library support:
 - Basic load tags
    - Sets the step of the lantern load process to run everything else
 - Enumeration
    - Runs through every single pack of different versions
    - Sets the highest version amongst them all
 - Resolution
    - Uses highest version to run the correct load file
    - Disables the rest

methods.name: simple_item_plugin.crafting.ShapedRecipe.export
documentation:
This function export the smithed crafter recipes to the ctx variable.
if is_external_recipe is True, the recipe will only be added to the registry and not to the function.

methods.name: simple_item_plugin.crafting.ShapelessRecipe.shaped_recipe

Only used to generate crafts in the guide.
